titleStmt.title: SII 18.297: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 297. (B.K. No. 53 of 1932-33.) GUTTAL, HAVERI TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: This inscription referring itself to the rule of Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Vīra-Vikramāditya over Banavase-nāḍu, is dated in Śaka 1112, Saumya, Āśhāḍha śu. 2, Vaḍḍavāra, corresponding to A.D., 1189 June 17, Saturday. The Śaka year cited is the current year. After giving the genealogy of the Gutta chiefs upto Vikramāditya (II), it states that he built a temple called Padmēśvara for the merit of Padmaladēvi who was his nurse (dhātrī). It also records a gift of land made for the same temple, at the time of the installation of the deity by Vikramāditya. The recipient of the gift was Rājaguru Kalyāṇaśakti, whose genealogy is also given. Guttavoḷal is mentioned as the capital of Vikramāditya. The inscription is much damaged.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© śrīmatpadmēśvaravaṭē yasya pādānatō hariḥ . rājaddaśāvatārāṁgaṁ labdhvā bhāti nakhabrajē . śrīgaṁgājaḷapūrṇnabiṁ
duruci muktādāmakaṁ pallavārāgaṁ bhōgisubhōga sūtravaḷitaṁ caṁdrōjvaḷā darśśamu
dyōgōnmaṁgaḷapūrṇnakuṁbhamene celvādājaṭābaṁdhamoldīgoḷpaṁ sale vikramārkka dharaṇīpāḷaṁge padmēśanu . ©
viśadavivēkigaḷgaṟiyalappinamīśvaraniccheyiṁ caturddaśa bhuvanaṁgaḷaṣṭatanu puṣṭiyināda venalpavitratākuśalamanēnaneṁbenavaṟa
lliyumīdhare pūjyamaṁte naldaśegide dēvana bhūmiyenalurvvareyurvvareyāgaḷoppu guṁ . bhuvanaprāsādamuṁ
nirmmipoḍide nelagaṭṭudghacāritrasasyōdbhava kṣētramabbōdarana misupanīvāsi nāvāsamaṁ tānavanvāvāsāṁ
drapīṭha suragirige sēvāsthānaraṁgasvayusthānavitānaṁ madhyalōkaṁ pogaḷalasadaḷaṁ saptapātāḷamūḷaṁ . dviguṇitavaḷita
dvīpābdhigaḷīrēḷāge kaḍege paṁcāśatkōṭigaṇatamantarlakṣade sogayikumiḷe ś®ṣṭiraṁgamaṁ tīvidavōl . dhare
gā jaṁbūdvīpada paridhi beḍaṁgāythu lavaṇa saradhi samudrōtkaradoḷade ramyamalla doḍirisalure kaḍe paṭṭagara gaḷa kaḍeyoḷa
daṁ . posedu bisuppinaṁgasamanīyada vārddhiyavārteyattaliṁtesegalī sa rasagaṇapratipākamidī maṇibrajaṁ misugu
va kaustubhapratimamīmakaraṁ mīgajaprasarame dēvadattiyenutuṁ lavaṇārṇna vadoḷpughūrṇikuṁ . Ālavaṇāṁ
budhiyade nirvēliyenal naḍuvemeṟeda jaṁbūdvīpa śrīlalitōdyānadi dikpāla vanapālaramaragiri puṇyaphaḷaṁ . giriśaṁ da lkō
ṭigaṁ jīvatati vividhamūḷāḷisaṁsāramaṁbhastaradēśakālacakraṁ jaḷakaḷitaghaṭīyaṁtra verkkōṭagaḷ bittaradiṁdaṁ pūḍideḷtāgire meṟe
dudu tatkāṁcanastaṁbhameṁboṁdiraviṁdaṁ mēru sarvvōttaravakhiḷa jaganmadhyamārādhya māguṁ . mērunagēḷāvṛtakiṁpuruṣa harivarṣa himavadacaḷave
nalkiṁtōraṁte teṁkalalliṁ sāraṁ ṣaṭkhaṁḍa bharatadakṣiṇakhaṇḍaṁ . kaliyugadoḷa māyeḍeyoḷ nelasirppudu kṛtayugaprabhāvaṁ dhātrītiḷakaṁ
māḷavadēśaṁ nalivinegaṁ poreye vikramādityanṛpaṁ . Ōjeya naranaṁ naḍeyise rājā kālasya kāraṇamenippōdita jagadoḷādudōjeya
bījaṁ kālāṁkuraṁ tadanurūpame dal . nigrahavṛtti dadi tarkkadoḷalladaḍilla nōḍe daṁḍagrahaṇaṁ vayaḥpariṇatarkkaḷoḷalladaḍilla tī
bradōṣagrahaṇaṁ jaḷūkiyamukhaṁgaḷoḷalladaḍillenalke bhūpāgraṇi vikramārka navanīparirakṣeyanaṁdu māḍidaṁ . Āneyadānadiṁ baḷeda balmaka
nānege kaṁbamaśvasantānada lōhavakkarege tatkhuralōhame sēnegaṁbu tatsēneya pāda dhūḷiyoḷe bāḷda jaḷaṁ sthaḷamāda bhūmi yiṁnenalakku
mō siriya maymeyanāvibhu vikramārkkana . samanārujjayinīvaraṁge śakanādā vikramādityabhūramaṇaṁgumene bhairavaṁ
gavadaṭaṁ tānādavaṁgoḷpinaṣṭamahāsiddhiyaneyde sādhisidudāttaṁgartthigaṁtā ra sōttamakuṁbhaṁgaḷanittavaṁge bagevaṁdī bhūribhūbhāgadoḷ
. Ene negaḷda vikramādityana vaṁśajarātanaṁnarāgare kalpāvanījada bījade kalpāvanījame puṭṭugume bēḷvavara keygayyoḷ .
Enutuṁ maḷippa manujara manastamaṁ piṁge naliye kavicakraṁ mēdini kaṇbaḍeda volāgire janiyisidaṁ vīravikramādityanṛpaṁ
dhanamuṁ dānada mayimeyuṁ taveyaveṁduṁ bhōjyamuṁ vahnidīvanamuṁ tatpariṇāmamaṁ kiḍisaveṁduṁ kāminībhōgamuṁ mana
diṁpuṁ paḷasāgaveṁduvenepī puṇyaṁ raṇēṣṭakke takkananēkārjjisadeṁbanāṁpadaṭarārā vikramādityana . sukṛta strījanayauvanāvaḷi kṛtārtthaṁ ba
llavarbballa vidde kṛtārtthaṁ parisēvegeydavara sēvādharmmadoṁdoḷpu nāḍe kṛtārtthaṁ migebēḷvarādarśa kṛtārtthaṁ tānenalbhōgicittakana nā
rudghadāni doreyārā vikramādityanoḷ . yopparbbānu jade jaḷanidhiya guṇpiniṁ śaiḷamaṁ prāggatiyiṁ
daṁ pōlvaneṁdēkeye pagevaḍeyādityana bē kaṁvārddhitaḷava pokkuṁ ma munaḍarggumeṁdaṁdu kkevīrasutagāṁbhīryyake
nityōnnatige nirupamaṁ vikramādityadēvaṁ . kuṁtaḷadē bhūkāṁte samaṁ rdoḍāvikrama bhūkāṁtaṁge mecci śrīyatu
ḷanatabhūpara siriyaṁ . nalaviṁdaṁ māḷvakuṁtaḷamadhyadoḷeseda vijayapathadiṁ baytaṁte śatruvaṭṭanade lasatsiṁdhuramaneseye vi
kramabhūpaṁ . Eseguṁ kuṁtaḷadoḷbanavasenāḍadaṟesapanēnaneṁbeṁ rasada maḷe suriye kāruṁ basantamuṁ vadaṟa naṁdanata
tiyoḷ . giḷigaḷanōḍipa kaḷekōkiḷagaḷaṁ nuḍiya gaḷaṁ maṁdraravaṁgaḷa lategaḷanāḍipa binadamalte banavasenāḍoḷ . banavase
nāḍoḷoppuvudu guttavoḷal vibhuvīravikramārkkanṛpana rājadhāni parikhājaḷadoḷ baḷesirda kōṭeyoḷ negaḷda mēgaṇaṭṭaḷeya beḷguḍi biṁ
bise piṁge bhūbharaṁ tanaguragaṁge bhōgavati saṁtasadiṁ guḍigaṭṭidaṁte vōl . manujarellaṁ dharmmadudyōgadiṁ dina
mellaṁ sakaḷōtsavaprakaramaṁ digbhāgamellaṁ sumaṁḍana ratnaprabheyiṁ digvaḷeyamellaṁ naḍa nānaṁdavardhanadi soṁpesedirppa guttavoḷalaṁ baṇni neṁ
budō . Ā nṛpatanayanatiśayamānadhanaṁ jōyidēvana dānadi nijavijayadiṁ sukhadiṁ piri
doḷpaṁ . garvvitaraṁji maṁḍaḷikabhairavaneṁbudu vīraraḷki paṁnirvvaragaṁḍaneṁbudu dharā rūpa ḷōrvvane nallaneṁbudakhiḷāvaḷi pogaḷe rūpa
ṟidaṁ karbbina billavaṁ diṭadineṁbudu bhāvade jōyidēvana . kavi subhaṭavivēka bahuvidyanu dāranudātta sau
myanenippinama rōrvvarārbbhavadīyamānavarppalarumuṁṭavarellara sadguṇāḷi gaḷvacanave rūpugoṁḍa vibhu jō
yidēvanaṁ . jasadiṁ taṁnaya disevettudu jagaṁ sadvastrabhūṣādhanaprasaratyāgade taṁna me yya mānavataṁna
ra sahasrastutadānadiṁ dharaṇi taṁnāsthānadantirddudeṁbesaviṁ jōmanṛpāḷakaṁ bhuvanamaṁ taṁnājñā
nvayakumudarājanavanige kalpōrvvijaṁ guttanṛpāḷaṁ rāji virōdhikāḷa vo
ppirppa rājadyaśaṁ nayadiṁ nālage baṁṇipo sōva māśrayamāytati ya
priyamaṁ dhātrige nallanāgi meṟedirddaṁ guttabhūpōttamaṁ . A ḷāpadi baṇni rū
paṁ kāmarūpaṁ suratarupatirūpaṁ viḷāsaikarūpaṁ priyarūpaṁ mogarūpaṁ satyarūpaṁ naya
rūpaṁ guttabhūpaṁ giriśacaraṇapadmārcanābhaktirūpaṁ . padumaladēvi guttanṛpavallabhe nī dhātrītaḷaṁ tigaḷi
llada gaṁgeya rūpugoṁḍaḷeṁbudu janamellameṁjalisadoppi vāṇi yeṁbudu dhare yyava balla
rār . guttanṛpaṁgamāyuvati padmegamiṁbine puṭṭida sva vīravikramanṛpaṁ sucāritramē gātramāgi sadartthiye
kāṁtiyāgi varavīrame meypiriyāgi satyavā ye śabdamāgiha ye rūpugoṁḍavōl . nṛpanā
vaṁ saccaritraṁ sucaritataranādaṁdu vikrāṁtadiṁ virājipa nāma kāśrayamenisidudāva samaṁtā
kṛpeyoḷaṁdāvanājñādharanenisidanājñādharaṁ lakṣmiyaṁ bhōgipanāvanī nu janame sedaṁvikramādityadēvaṁ . siriyiṁ
sukhade misupalliya cāradiṁ bhāsuramāgirddājñe Īśārccanade niṁda dīrgghāyu susthitiyoḷā prītiyiṁ
taṁnoḷe nelasida kalyāṇameṁdiṁtivoṁdāgire pūjyaprājyarādyara dharmaṁ sogayipa vikramādityadēvaṁ . suya
sonu guttanamaga prōddāni tējōguṇa prabhu rārājipa vikramārkkadharaṇīśaṁ caṁdraguptānvaya
ḷādharaṁ sukhayutakalyāṇaśakti kramābjabhava salipalīyane sadvaṁśasaṁbhūtara .
rttiya cittadayāvṛtaṁ jalapūta caritravaṁkuramādā koṁba ramyasaṁgītada balme sukhamoppi
puṇyakalpabhūjātamidiṁtu rājyavanadoḷbaḷedirddudu vikramārkkana . © © © © svasti samadhigatapaṁcamahāśabda mahāmaṁ
ḍaḷēśvaraṁ Ujjayinīpuravarādhīśvaraṁ vaṭakalpavṛkṣalāṁcchitavijayadhvajaṁ bhuvana rakṣaṇaikadakṣadakṣi
ṇabhuja maṁḍaḷikabhairavaṁ Ānaṁditayuvatīnayanakairavaṁ caṁdraguptānvayasudhārṇna vapūrṇnacaṁdraṁ vibhavāma
rēṁdraṁ haricaraṇanakhakiraṇasāṁdracaṁdrikācakōraṁ gurupadapayōdharānaṁdita mayūraṁ māninīmānasa
rvvasvasūṟekāṟaṁ raṇadoḷnīṟaṁ paṁnirvvaragaṁḍaṁ samaraśaunṁḍaṁ viṣamaturaṁga mārōhaṇādityaṁ vīravikramādityaṁ banavasenāḍaṁ duṣṭanigraha śiṣṭa
pratipāḷanadi pāḷisuttaṁ sukhasaṁkathāvinōdadiṁ rājyaṁgeyyutavirppanā mahātmana mahāpradhānana mahime
yeṁtene . lōkaśrīgittu kīrtyujvaḷavasanade ś®ṁgāramaṁ tāṁ catu prakṣēpa vyatheyuḍuguṁ dharmmadhēnukramakkaṁ
tēkīmārgga prabhāvaṁ bhudhara kalimalavyāptiyiṁ karggitoppitī śrīge nairmalyamanesagadudī dāsirājōdghavṛttaṁ . Ānṛpa
na dāyiya mahimeyeṁtene . dēvaki paḍedaḷmuṭṭidōvisukhaṁ baḍedaḷaṁte gōpa nippaṁte vikramanaṁ padmaladēviye paḍedaḷsu kha
dādiye nōṁtaḷ . Enisida vīravikramana dādi sukhāvaḷigādilakṣmiyappanupama dēvi saṁnutacaritre saduttamagōtre
dharmmavarttane sukhagātre padme paramēśapadāṁbujabhaktisadme sajjananutapādapadme meṟedaḷguṇagauravadiṁ mahātapaṁ . patibhaktiprītiyiṁdaṁ
naḍedu vibudhaśiṣṭēṣṭaraṁ dānasanmānataraṁ prasādadoḷpūjisi kaḍunalaviṁ stanyamaṁ vikramārkkakṣitipaṁgī tanayavina
yaṁbettu sadvṛtte padmāvati kālajñānadiṁ śaṁkara dakamaḷakeydiniṁ padmeyādaḷ . Ā padmātmajanesedaṁ rū rāyuṣya
dinaṁtā padmātmajanabhavaśrīpavapadmajananūnabhaktiyiṁ poṁnanadhipaṁ saṁdāsaṁnana poṁnanaṁ
vanatiguṇasaṁpaṁnanaṁ poṁnanaṁ śaṁkarabhaktyutpaṁnanaṁ poṁnananavarivara neṁbinana rvviyurvvi pogaḷe negaḷda Iṁteseva
nvaya lakṣmīkāṁtaṁ śrīvīravikramādityaṁ niścitarājyaprājyasukhaṁ guṇadiṁ meṟevaṁ . siriyaṁ khyā
tipriyaṁ khyātiyiṁ neredirddā guṇagauravaṁ guṇadiṁ cārucaritraṁgaḷiṁ guru sadbhakti guruprasādadeśiva
yiṁ sthirasaukhyaṁ dorevettaveṁdoḍeṇeyārī vikramādityanoḷ . Enisida vikramādityana guru kalyāṇaśaktiya dinaydeneya
manuvenisi kaliyuga janakke kṛtayuga caritramaṁ niyamisuvaṁ . Ā guruku ḷakramameṁtene . Ātiśayaśakti sa ma
danaprabhe kiṭṭada kiṭṭagāvesaṁtati haraparvvatāvaḷi budhastutaṁ kālamukhānvayaṁ jagaṁnutaguruvaṁśalaṁbamene tatkuladuttamaśaktiyaṁ nutabrata
manatīva dhairyyaguṇamaṁ deśeyoḷpanadanēnaneṁbudō . śivaliṁgaṁ vāmadēva brati patitiḷakaṁ vādirudraṁ kriyāśakti vivēkaikāśrayaṁ śāṁtarasa
damṛtarāśibratīśaṁ tapakkoppuva sarbbēśaṁ jana citta pogaḷvaṁ kalyāṇaśakti bratīṁdraṁ savanāsaṁpadagaḷgadenisidudu tapōrājya saptāṁgavṛttaṁ . dēvāgā
rēṇa bhūmiṁ stutatithisukṛtasnānadānēna tōyaṁ hōmastōmēna vahniṁ kusuma maḷayajāmōdavṛdhyā samīraṁ kīrtyuccaṁdrōdayē
nāṁbaramatiśayati prāṇinaṁ dānaśaktyā śrīmatkalyāṇaśakti sitatarakṛpayā sarvva bhūtāgracittaḥ . mura vyāpārēṇa kri
yōcitadaśārūpē paraprīṇanassālōkaḥ samabhāvabhāsuranigamaḥ kalyāṇaśabdēramaḥ pātrasnēhaguṇaprayōjitayaśōdīpō lasatprāṇataḥ trailōkyē sa
tu bhāti bhāskarasamaḥ kalyāṇaśaktērayē . samasaṁdāgamadāgama paurāṇaka purāṇaṁ svarbhōgamardāta tarkkatō numānaṁ satkathāvidde gaḷaṁ mayōdyatka
ḷeyaṇke jāṇsukavitā śrīsārasamalte saṁbhramadiṁdaṁ kavitāytenippudenippa kalyāṇaśakti bratī . pāpahasitapara vibhatsa tavṛtta
kumarō . jagake sakaruṇaṁ śrīge śṛṁgāri śāṁtākṛtiyiṁ kalyāṇaśaktibrati navarasavu bilvāḷva natipuṇya maṁ negaḷvu
du citraṁ pavitraṁ . Eṁdu budhāvaḷiyatyānaṁdade pogaḷvā guruprasādade dharmakkeṁdu bagedaṁda nagadi māḍisidaṁ padmalē
śvarāvāsamaṁ svadhātrige tatpadmalenārige puṇyamadaggalipaṁtire citrapatrataticitritamaṁ . kṛtakṛtyaṁ guruliṁgapratiṣṭheyaṁ māḍidaṁ stutakalyāṇabratitiḷakaṁ śivadātmasthita nāgire sau
ra puṭṭi padmale . paramācāryyara viśvakarmma mayamāṁḍavyarkyaḷā śāstravistaramīlakṣade rājasirkuvene nōḍalviśvakarmmikamaccari saccitramayaṁ vicāravipuḷaṁ māṁ
ḍavya saṁsēvyamāgire padmēśvaramaṁ negaḷci nalidaṁ śrīvikramādhīśvaraṁ . © © [Iṁ] tu śakavarṣa 1112 neya saumyasaṁvatsarada Āṣāḍha śuddha bidige vaḍḍavāradaṁdu Ā dēvara prati
ṣṭheya mahōtsavadoḷā dēvaraṁgabhōgarangabhōganityanaimittika pūjārtthaṁ Ā rāja guru kalyāṇaśaktidēvara kālam karcci dhārāpūrvvakaṁ māḍiyāyūriṁ teṁkadese ya keṟe
ya keḷagālakabbeyiṁ teṁka kuṁbhēśvaradiṁ paḍuvalācāriyagaddeyiṁ baḍagal gadde matta roṁdu kammaṁ mūvattu mattamūriṁ baḍaga tatyarasana koḷadiṁ paḍuvaṇa beḷuhigeya dāriyiṁ paḍuva
bōvikageyyiṁ mūḍalere mattarēḷu mattamādāriya jakkiyabbeya bāgiṁ paḍuvalu vijayapāṁḍyana keyyiṁ baḍagalere mattarāṟu mattamūriṁ paḍuvalu pārbbanakeṟeyiṁ baḍaga rittiya
dāriyiṁ teṁka hōge mattareraḍu Āṁtu mattarppadinaydu Ā dēvara purada pūvina toṁṭa kaṁmaṁ mūvattu mattamūroḷage malliseṭṭiya gaḍiyiṁ paḍuvala gaḍi nivēśa
nameraḍu mārikabbeya māḷigeyiṁ baḍagaloṁdu negaḷiya gāṇamoṁdu mattaṁ mūlasuṁkaṁ mattamelehēṟiṁge nūṟu poṟege nūṟu piḍiyaḍake poṁna vattiyalmārikabbege pō
pa Ōṇiyiṁ paḍuvalūriṁ teṁka maṁneya tōṁṭadiṁ mūḍalārādhyara tōṇṭadiṁ baḍagala ḍakedōṁṭa mara sāsiramiṁtī dharmmamaṁ pratipāḷisidavarvvāraṇāsiyoḷpuṇyadina doḷpāsirakavilegaḷaṁ suva
rṇadiṁdaḷaṁkarisiyanibarvēdapāragargge sahiraṇyōbhayamukhidānamaṁ koṭṭa phalamaṁ paḍevar © pratipāḷisadavarāvāraṇāsiyoḷākavilegaḷanādinadoḷkoṁda pāpamaṁ paḍevar ©
Digital edition of SII 18.297 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
